violations.text: The 2-door dairy cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 44 DF at the time of inspection. Food within unit was observed in temperature and was moved to working refrigeration. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in the 2-door dairy cooler until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 3-door grab n go shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The outside dumpster area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
Bags of chips were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
Litter was observed around the dumpster in the enclosed dumpster area. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
